title: Source non-interactive init defaults from stack catalog
description: Update `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/init.py` so `--non-interactive` constructs Python defaults from `STACKS[0]` instead of hardcoded strings, keeping the non-interactive path consistent with the interactive stack catalog.
acceptance_criteria: `init.py` imports the shared stack catalog from onboarding prompts.
Non-interactive init uses Python display name, test command, and build/check command sourced from `STACKS[0]`.
No Python-specific default strings remain duplicated in the non-interactive path.
The change does not alter existing non-interactive control flow beyond default sourcing.

handoff_summary.completed: Non-interactive `takt init` now unpacks `STACKS[0]` for language, test_command, and build_check_command. `STACKS` is exported from `onboarding/__init__.py`.
handoff_summary.risks: None — `STACKS[0]` is `("Python", "pytest", "python -m py_compile")`, identical values to what was previously hardcoded, so behaviour is unchanged.
handoff_summary.next_action: Tester agent should verify non-interactive init produces the correct InitAnswers values sourced from STACKS[0], and that any existing tests for the non-interactive path still pass.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: None — only `init.py` and `onboarding/__init__.py` were touched; no overlap with other in-progress beads expected.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: Imported `STACKS` inside the `if non_interactive` branch (lazy import) to mirror the existing pattern where `InitAnswers`, `collect_init_answers`, and `scaffold_project` are also imported lazily inside `command_init`. `STACKS` is also added to the `onboarding` package's public `__all__` so it is accessible as `from ...onboarding import STACKS` and consistent with the package's re-export convention.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: Verify that a non-interactive `command_init` call produces an `InitAnswers` where `language == STACKS[0][0]`, `test_command == STACKS[0][1]`, and `build_check_command == STACKS[0][2]`. Regression: existing tests for the non-interactive path should still pass with identical field values since `STACKS[0]` equals the previously hardcoded strings.
handoff_summary.known_limitations: N/A — implementation fully satisfies the acceptance criteria.

conflict_risks: None — only `init.py` and `onboarding/__init__.py` were touched; no overlap with other in-progress beads expected.

execution_history.summary: Updated `init.py` non-interactive path to source defaults from `STACKS[0]` instead of hardcoded strings. Also exported `STACKS` from `onboarding/__init__.py` so the public API surface is consistent.
